description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a pastel tie-dye pattern, slim-fit pants, and white sneakers. The individual is wearing a baseball cap and a face covering or mask, which partially conceals the lower face. The hood of the sweatshirt is up, and the cap is worn over it, giving a layered look. The hands are relaxed and extended slightly outward, and the overall build is average and proportional. No accessories such as bags or electronic devices are visible. The figure's clothing and accessories suggest a contemporary, streetwear-inspired style suitable for city environments.
description: An adult in casual streetwear with a hooded sweatshirt, slim pants, sneakers, a cap, and a face mask, standing upright. The look is modern and urban, with no visible carried items.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pastel tie-dye hoodie, face mask, cap, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, mask, and the fit of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded sweatshirt, cap, and the straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the hood, mask, and sneaker profile.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt, slim-fit pants, baseball cap, face mask
attribute_hairstyle: hair fully covered by cap and hood
